What a beautiful restaurant with incredible food. Every mouthful was delicious. Top quality and would definitely recommend

The appetizer arrived 40 minutes after ordering. They served fried plantain with caviar, terrible !!  This restaurant has no idea how to serve caviar if you’re a fan, don’t do it!
Another 20 minutes until our entree arrived. 
We will never visit this place again. Awful unfortunately awful!!

We really fell in love with La Mar, it's just wonderful. From the reception, service and an impeccably executed menu to the tasting of the options we selected, everything was perfect. 
It was an incredible gastronomic experience and I want to repeat it when I return to San Francisco.
